jobDescription:
Team:

The Mapmaking team sits at the heart of HERE’s mission to create the world’s most accurate, up-to-date, and intelligent maps. We design and operate scalable pipelines for onboarding massive datasets from customers and partners, while developing and optimizing geospatial processing services that transform raw map inputs into high-quality, production-ready products. Our work spans innovation in AI, big data, and algorithmic evolution to advance how maps are processed, validated, and enriched, supporting both large-scale customer programs with premium automotive brands and multi-industry partners, as well as internal transformation initiatives.

 

Responsibilities:

HERE Technologies is looking for an experienced Lead Software Engineer to join our highly motivated Mapmaking team in Germany. The Mapmaking team builds and operates core technologies and services for onboarding, processing, and quality assuring digital map data.

 

You will focus on designing and developing high-scale geospatial processing systems, building cloud-native services, and evolving backend data pipelines that support map content creation and validation.

  • Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services and data processing pipelines for map content and geospatial data.

  • Contribute to and review architectural designs for distributed systems and cloud services.

  • Collaborate cross-functionally with engineers, product managers, data scientists, and architects to define technical solutions.

  • Mentor junior engineers and support technical best practices across the team.

  • Drive operational excellence by contributing to CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and automated testing.

  • Ensure high software quality standards and reliability in production environments.

  • Investigate and adopt emerging technologies in geospatial processing, cloud infrastructure, and big data frameworks.

  • Work closely with colleagues in Europe and around the globe.

Tech Stack: Java, Scala, Python, SQL, AWS, Docker, GitLab, Spark, Kafka, and GeoJSON.

NOTE: This is an individual contributor (IC) position.

jobDescription:
Team:
We are looking for a motivated and experienced Principal Engineer to join the HERE Professional Services - Global Solution Engineering team.

 

Our Professional Services team delivers tailored geospatial and mobility solutions across industries worldwide. We support the automotive sector with embedded navigation, infotainment, and driver assistance capabilities, and we also work with transportation and logistics, telecommunications, the public sector, retail, and emerging mobility providers. Across these industries, we help organizations use location intelligence to make better decisions, operate more efficiently, and deliver smarter digital experiences.

 

This role involves leading the technical delivery of customer-facing software solutions across industries such as Automotive, Transport, and Logistics. You will be responsible for the full lifecycle of solution development, from planning and design to implementation and testing, while serving as the technical authority within your project scope. You will collaborate with internal stakeholders, including project, product, and engineering teams, as well as interface with customers around the globe. You will play a vital role in ensuring the successful delivery of software design, implementation, integration, and quality.

Key Responsibilities

Solution Scope and Delivery

  • Analyze requirements and contribute to opportunity scoping, technical analysis, and effort estimation.

  • Support backlog creation and refinement.

  • Design and document technical solutions aligned with customer needs and architectural standards.

  • Act as the technical authority within the assigned project scope.

Technical Leadership

  • Define and communicate a shared technical vision across teams.

  • Lead internal and external development teams to meet project delivery goals within predetermined timelines, budgets, and quality standards.

  • Maintain a comprehensive system-level understanding by contributing hands-on to development, integration, and testing activities.

  • Mentor and coach team members to foster growth and technical excellence.

  • Drive adoption of engineering best practices and frameworks.

  • Lead internal initiatives that support strategic engineering goals.

Communication and Stakeholder Management

  • Communicate project status, risks, and dependencies to stakeholders.

  • Translate complex technical concepts for diverse audiences, ensuring clarity for both technical and non-technical audiences.

  • Serve as the technical point of contact between the program and development teams.

  • Collaborate with Solution Architects on solution design and implementation planning.

  • Coordinate with functional managers and program managers on execution and risk management.

description: As a Principal Solution Architect, you will be part of a team of seasoned and like-minded individuals within our Professional Services organization.   You will regularly interface with customers as well with internal stakeholders around the globe, su
jobDescription:
As a Principal Solution Architect, you will be part of a team of seasoned and like-minded individuals within our Professional Services organization.

 

You will regularly interface with customers as well with internal stakeholders around the globe, such as project, product, and engineering teams. Your goal will be to bring to life complex software solutions that advance HERE’s geo-location business and vision. Your peers will rely on you to provide them with technical leadership as well with business acumen.

 

Our team often crosses functional and technical domains (cloud services, embedded and mobile clients). Being familiar with all these domains is a huge plus, but for this role the key will be deep understanding of the automotive domain, especially AD/ADAS systems in embedded environments. You will design the overall high-level system, explaining both problem and solution with clarity and precision to all necessary stakeholders. Consistent software requirement elicitation and management is essential in validating that we are building the right thing.

Your main responsibilities include:

  • Driving the draft solution design during the ideation and opportunity quotation phases (RfX).

  • Identifying the right products and technologies to solve the customers' problems.

  • Being the primary point of contact and trusted technical advisor for all stakeholders (internal and external).

  • Mapping stakeholder requirements to system requirements.

  • Developing static and behavioral views and defining the interfaces for the system under the given requirements.

  • Taking timely decisions and communicating them to all necessary stakeholders.

  • Taking the lead and accountability for the technical soundness and cost effectiveness of the solution across its lifecycle, from the bidding phase, to execution, to go-live, and finally to maintenance hand-over.

description: As the Senior Technical Support Engineer you are an experienced support engineer with a pre-sales/post sales mindset, and ensures that the Customer makes optimal use of HERE products and services, from the evaluation phase through the production phas
jobDescription:
As the Senior Technical Support Engineer you are an experienced support engineer with a pre-sales/post sales mindset, and ensures that the Customer makes optimal use of HERE products and services, from the evaluation phase through the production phase and into the maintenance phase. You will ensure customer satisfaction by providing technical training, resolving issues and being the voice of the Customer to internal HERE departments. You have strong customer focus, establish close relationships with the Customer, product management and sales, and are a subject matter expert of the broad range of HERE products and services.

 

Your main responsibilities include:

  • Analyzing tests and debugging software issues reported by customers
  • Addressing issues in a systematic approach coordinating across teams and stakeholders to ensure alignment on criticality with a “single source of truth”, timely executive visibility and reporting, have lessons learned built into actionable follow-up plans
  • Working on technical consulting assignments for/with the customer
  • Working with sales to complete RFQs and translating customer needs into requirements, products, and solutions
  • Providing direct technical expertise for opportunities in one or multiple domains of knowledge
  • Providing feedback to Sales, Product Marketing, and Product Management on current and future product requirements (acts as the voice of the Customer)
  • Participating in internal HERE technical communities and in the broader industry through events, blogs, whitepapers, and articles for your domains of expertise

description: The Mapmaking team sits at the heart of HERE’s mission to create the world’s most accurate, up-to-date, and intelligent maps. We design and operate scalable pipelines for onboarding massive datasets from customers and partners, while developing and o
jobDescription:
The Mapmaking team sits at the heart of HERE’s mission to create the world’s most accurate, up-to-date, and intelligent maps. We design and operate scalable pipelines for onboarding massive datasets from customers and partners, while developing and optimizing geospatial processing services that transform raw map inputs into high-quality, production-ready products. Our work spans innovation in AI, big data, and algorithmic evolution to advance how maps are processed, validated, and enriched, supporting both large-scale customer programs with premium automotive brands and multi-industry partners, as well as internal transformation initiatives.

The Mapmaking team builds and operates core technologies and services for onboarding, processing, and quality assuring digital map data.

 

Software Engineering Manager role will be responsible for planning and leading the implementation of agile software development projects, DevOps practices and test automation with the goal of delivering increasingly valuable features into the HERE platform while driving continuous improvements in security, quality, and service levels.  You will partner with product managers and engineering leadership to craft and drive rational planning and tradeoff decisions.  

 

The successful candidate will be a software craftsman, with a track record of successful software projects against demanding requirements. She or he will be a trusted coach to software developers, a trusted partner to product management and approach complex prioritization challenges with a calm and analytical mindset.
